title: Complete security-event cleanup permission chain and remove undesigned i18n table-head title
goal: Make the security-event cleanup/acknowledge feature work end-to-end for non-admin roles by registering the missing required API policies, and remove the undesigned '翻译详情' table-head block from the i18n management list page.

in: requiredAPIPoliciesByPermissionKey mappings for system:security-event:acknowledge and system:security-event:clear
Unit test coverage for the new mappings
Removal of the system-list__table-head block (title '翻译详情' + count) from I18nList.tsx
out: login-log and session action-permission API policy mappings (same gap class, tracked as residual risk)
Any backend route/handler/service change (cleanup chain already exists and is tested)
i18n locale key removal (i18n.viewTitle is still used by the row detail modal)

minimumViableApproach: Register the two missing permission-key → API-policy mappings in the existing workbench switch (keyMatch2 already supports the :id pattern), extend the existing unit test, and delete the single undesigned JSX block; verify with go tests plus the frontend contract gates.
successCriteria: Permission workbench reports and remediates the cleanup/acknowledge API policies for roles granted system:security-event:clear/acknowledge, so non-admin cleanup calls pass Casbin.
go test ./modules/system/iam/permission passes with the extended assertions.
The i18n list page no longer renders the '翻译详情' table-head; tsc, eslint, system page admission, shell visual contract, i18n and UI contract checks all pass.
deferredCodeIssues: login-log/session action permissions (system:login-log:clear/delete/export, system:session:clear/delete) share the same missing-mapping gap in requiredAPIPoliciesByPermissionKey; deferred to keep this fix scoped to the reported security-event issue.
